name: ESSENTIAL OSTEOLYSIS

demographics.Histo: proliferation + hyperplasia of smooth muscle cells of synovial arterioles

dominant_finding: progressive osteolysis of carpal + tarsal bones
discriminating_features: progressive osteolysis of carpal + tarsal bones
thinned pointed proximal ends of metacarpals + metatarsals
elbows show same type of destruction
bathyrocephalic depression of base of skull

general: progressive osteolysis of carpal + tarsal bones
thinned pointed proximal ends of metacarpals + metatarsals
elbows show same type of destruction
bathyrocephalic depression of base of skull
